Please wait.
When the connection is restored, those features will be activated.

messages.#when_all_downloads_are_complet:
When all downloads are complete, it will perform the selected action.
A warning notification will be displayed for a period of time so that the operation can be canceled.
When the time expires, the action will be performed.
prompts.#this_will_reset_all_settings_pr:
This will reset all settings.

messages.#sign_and_link_benefits_your_tw:
Sign in and link the benefits of your Twitch account with {appName}.
(Stream Ad-Free benefits, Subscriber-Only Stream access, Subscriber-Only Video access, Twitch Prime or Twitch Turbo benefits, etc.)
prompts.#are_you_sure_you_want_cancel_si: Are you sure you want to cancel the sign-in operation in progress?
prompts.#are_you_sure_you_want_sign_out: Are you sure you want to sign out?
prompts.#_has_been_launched_please_proce: {browserName} has been launched. Please proceed with the sign-in process.
errors.#an_unexpected_error_occurred_whi: An unexpected error occurred while launching {browserName}. Please ensure that the latest version of {browserName} is properly installed.
prompts.#the_twitch_account_saved_your_b:
The Twitch account saved in your {browserName} browser will be detected and linked.
Since {appName} shares the same account information as your browser, signing out of your Twitch account in the browser will also sign you out of {appName}.


Before proceeding, please make sure that {browserName} is installed and that you are signed in to Twitch.

Also, please close all {browserName} windows and terminate any running {browserName} processes.
errors.#unable_detect_please_make_sure_i:
Unable to detect {browserName}.
Please make sure {browserName} is properly installed.
errors.#failed_connect_if_is_currently_r:
Failed to connect to the {browserName}.

If {browserName} is currently running, please close all windows and try again.

If it's not running, the issue may be caused by {browserName}'s security settings blocking external connections.
Consider trying a different browser.
errors.#an_unexpected_error_occurred_ple: An unexpected error occurred. Please ensure that the latest version of {browserName} is properly installed and all {browserName} windows are closed.
errors.#unable_find_twitch_account_pleas: Unable to find a Twitch account. Please make sure that {browserName} is signed in to Twitch.

messages.#i_accept_terms_service: I accept the terms of service.

errors.#a_network_error_occurred_while_l: A network error occurred while loading your account data.
errors.#an_authentication_error_has_occu:
An authentication error has occurred.

messages.#your_session_has_expired_pleas:
Your session has expired.

info.#this_stream_may_contain_ads_if_com:
This stream may contain ads.
If commercials are broadcast, the portion of the stream during the commercials may not be available for download, and it may appear as though the stream is interrupted.
To prevent ads, you need to sign in with an account that has ad-free benefits, such as Twitch Turbo, or an account that subscribes to the channel.
errors.#authentication_your_account_has_: Authentication of your account has been denied.
info.#this_content_is_not_available_your: This content is not available in your region.
info.#this_is_just_preview_some_values_m:
This is just a preview.
Some values may be different from the actual ones. ({properties}, etc.)
errors.#please_note_that_certain_video_q:
Please note that certain video qualities (such as Source) may not be available immediately after a live broadcast begins.
If this option is disabled, it will automatically select and begin downloading the closest available quality.
If this option is enabled, it will wait until the selected quality is available.
(Please be aware that if the selected quality continues to be unavailable, the download will not proceed.)
errors.#unable_start_scheduled_download_: Unable to start scheduled download for channel {channel}.
errors.#the_preferred_resolution_was_not:
The preferred resolution was not found.
You have disabled the download until a matching resolution is found.
errors.#unable_start_new_download_this_f:
Unable to start a new download.
This feature has been disabled.
messages.#changes_will_take_effect_next_: Changes will take effect from the next download.
prompts.#the_filename_template_contains_: The filename template contains a 'resolution' variable. Do you want to create a new filename based on the changed resolution?
prompts.#update_track_mode_is_currently_:
Update track mode is currently enabled.
Setting the end of the crop range will not track updates.
Proceed?
messages.#for_precise_range_handling_it_:
For precise range handling, it is necessary to re-encode the video from the beginning, a process which can be very time-consuming.
To speed up this process, {appName} performs the cutting operation using computationally inexpensive points near the specified range, without re-encoding.
There is no loss during this process, but a few additional seconds may be saved before and after the specified range.
If precise range handling is required, please process the downloaded video using a professional video editor.
prompts.#the_end_crop_range_is_currently:
The end of the crop range is currently set.
Enabling update track mode will ignore the end of the crop range and continue downloading.
Proceed?
messages.#there_is_another_download_prog: There is another download in progress with the same file name.
prompts.#a_file_same_name_already_exists:
A file with the same name already exists.
Overwrite?
errors.#the_target_directory_or_filename: The target directory or filename is unavailable.
errors.#an_error_occurred_while_generati: An error occurred while generating the file name.
messages.#you_cannot_perform_this_action: You cannot perform this action now.
prompts.#this_disables_all_scheduled_dow:
This disables all scheduled downloads and disconnects from the channel.
Proceed?
prompts.#are_you_sure_you_want_stop_down: Are you sure you want to stop the download?
prompts.#are_you_sure_you_want_cancel_do: Are you sure you want to cancel the download?
errors.#folder_not_found_it_has_been_mov:
Folder not found.
It has been moved, renamed or deleted.
errors.#file_not_found_it_has_been_moved:
File not found.
It has been moved, renamed or deleted.
errors.#a_system_error_has_occurred_poss:
A system error has occurred.

Possible Causes

* Too long or invalid filename or path
* Out of storage capacity
* Needs permission to perform this action

If the error persists, try Run as administrator.
errors.#process_exited_unexpectedly_poss:
Process exited unexpectedly.

Possible Causes

* Corruption of the original file
* Invalid crop range
* Too long or invalid filename or path
* Out of memory
* Out of storage capacity
* Lack of device performance
* Needs permission to perform this action

If the error persists, try Run as administrator.
messages.#you_have_downloaded_total_vide:
You have downloaded a total of {totalFiles}({totalSize}) videos so far.
Please become a patron of {appName} for better functionality and service.
messages.#allow_url_search_retrieve_exte:
Allow URL Search to retrieve external content.
You can download content outside of Twitch.
info.#if_commercials_are_broadcast_durin: If commercials are broadcast during this stream, they will be handled according to the following rules.
info.#_skip_segments_ads_are_skipped_but:
[Skip Segments]

Ads are skipped, but the stream during that time cannot be downloaded.
In this case, no alternative screen is shown, and it will directly connect to the scene after the ad, making the stream appear as if it's interrupted in the middle.
info.#_alternative_screen_displays_alter:
[Alternative Screen]

Displays an alternate screen instead of skipping ads.
In this case, the entire length of the stream is maintained, but some players might not play the video correctly.
prompts.#_remux_file_will_be_saved_as_st:
[Remux]

The file will be saved as a standard video file.
This involves a minor conversion process of the Transport Stream file to ensure its compatibility with standard players.
The quality of the video is retained, with only additional information about the video being modified for compatibility with standard players.
errors.#_concat_this_feature_enables_you:
[Concat]

This feature enables you to store Transport Stream file in its original form, without any conversion to ensure its compatibility with standard players.
Since these files are typically designed for streaming, they may not play correctly on certain players.
Additionally, if commercials are broadcast during a live stream or parts are missing due to network issues, some players might not play the video correctly.
errors.#if_there_are_no_problems_sound_s:
If there are no problems with the sound source used, or if there are parts that have been muted in error despite having permission to use them, you can use this function to unmute them.
In some cases, unmute may not be successful.
messages.#downloads_live_replay_continuo:
Downloads the live replay continuously until the broadcast ends.
The download ends if there are no changes in the video for a certain amount of time.
messages.#this_download_will_be_prioriti: This download will be prioritized. Downloads with this option take precedence over those without.
errors.#downloading_this_channel_has_bee: Downloading {contentType} from this channel has been restricted by the streamer({channel})'s request or by the administrator.
errors.#this_content_has_been_restricted: This content has been restricted by the streamer({channel})'s request or by the administrator.
messages.#to_protect_rights_streamers_re: To protect the rights of streamers, {appName} restricts downloads when a content restriction request is received.
messages.#your_download_has_been_termina: Your download has been terminated due to content restrictions.
info.#attempting_start_new_download_base:
Attempting to start a new download based on your download history.
File data and download settings are generated based on this history and may differ from the current {contentType}. ({properties}, etc.)

ui.#changing_this_setting_will_restart_t: Changing this setting will restart the application.
ui.#increasing_speed_boosts_downloads_bu:
Increasing speed boosts downloads, but can slow down other network activities like watching Twitch or YouTube.
Please maintain a balanced speed.
Keep in mind, beyond a certain level, boosting speed might not necessarily improve performance, depending on your hardware and network capabilities.
ui.#instant_download_downloads_immediate: Instant Download (Downloads immediately with options previously used for this type.)
ui.#scheduled_downloads_will_be_displaye: Scheduled downloads will be displayed here.
ui.#some_settings_are_restricted_during_: Some settings are restricted during download progress.
ui.#the_actual_cut_may_vary_a: The actual cut may vary a few seconds from the specified range.
ui.#these_changes_will_take_effect_from: These changes will take effect from the next download.
ui.#this_stream_may_contain_ads_to:
This stream may contain ads.
To block ads, you must sign in with a subscribed account.
